content.mainTitle: Convert YouTube to MP3 at High Quality
content.intro1: Y2mate is a dedicated online tool that allows you to extract high-quality audio from YouTube videos directly in your browser without any software installation. Whether you're looking to save a trending song for your music library or a podcast for offline listening, this converter offers the best balance of speed and sound fidelity. We support a full range of bitrates, including 128kbps, 192kbps, and 320kbps, giving you full control over your audio experience.
content.intro2: For those who need more than just a standard MP3, Y2mate also supports advanced audio formats like WAV for lossless quality, as well as OGG and OPUS for modern, efficient codecs. It's the perfect solution for anyone wanting a clean, safe, and registration-free way to build their personal audio collection on any device, from Android and iPhone to Windows and Mac.

instructions.title: How to Convert YouTube to MP3 & More
steps: Paste your link: Copy the YouTube URL and paste it into the search box above.
Pick your format & quality: Hit "Start" and select your preferred bitrate (128kbps, 192kbps, or 320kbps) or format (WAV, OGG, OPUS).
Download: Click the button, and the audio file is saved directly to your device in seconds.

whyChoose.title: Why Audio Lovers Choose Y2mate
reasons: Multiple Bitrate Options: Choose 320kbps for crystal-clear sound that sounds great on professional headphones, or 128kbps to save storage space on your phone.
Advanced Format Options: Beyond MP3, we support WAV for uncompressed quality, and OGG/OPUS for audiophiles who prefer modern, high-performance codecs.
No Length Limits: Easily convert long-form content like DJ mixes, full audiobooks, and multi-hour podcasts without any quality loss or cut-offs.
Purely Web-Based: Keep your device clutter-free. No apps to install and no sketchy extensions—everything is handled securely in the cloud.

items.question: What is the difference between MP3 bitrates (128k vs 320k)?
items.answer: 320kbps is the highest quality MP3 offers, providing the richest sound with the most detail. 128kbps uses less storage space and is perfect for speech-heavy content like interviews, news, or lectures.

items.question: Why should I choose WAV, OGG, or OPUS?
items.answer: Choose WAV if you need the original, lossless quality for professional editing. OGG and OPUS are modern formats that offer excellent sound quality at even smaller file sizes than MP3, perfect for advanced media players.

items.question: Is it safe to use this converter on my phone?
items.answer: Yes, 100%. Y2mate runs entirely in your mobile browser, so there's no need to download risky files or apps. It's a clean and secure way to grab audio while you're on the go.

items.question: Can I convert very long music mixes or podcasts?
items.answer: Absolutely. We handle long-form content all the time. Whether it's a 5-minute song or a 3-hour ambient sleep mix, our tool will process it for you without any issues.

items.question: How do I save the audio directly to my iPhone?
items.answer: Simply use the Safari browser to download the file. Once it's finished, tap the download icon in the address bar and save the audio to your "Files" app for easy offline access anytime.
